chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-758 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.10115/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection (s) 3. For order on M.A No.9499/2025 4. For hearing of main case 24.11.2025 Mr.Sher Dil Ansari, Advocate for the applicant ********** 1. Granted. 2to4. The applicant/first husband of proposed accused Mst.Lela had filed an application for registration of an FIR before the IV-Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Hyderabad on the ground that his wife/ proposed accused No.1 Mst.Lela had married the respondent No.2 without his permission. The Ex-Officio Justice of Peace has rejected the application filed by applicant Abdul Razzaque Jamali vide Order dated 20.10.2025, on the grounds that in these facts and circumstances of the case as the accusation concerns alleged commission of fornication/Zina, therefore, instead of approaching the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, the applicant should avail the remedy provided under the Special law. I do not find any defect in the said order, the Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed in limine. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
